market_pulse: Competitive landscape shows Hakkasan, Zouk, and Encore ramping DJ announcements; OMNIA leveraging chandelier content for visual distinction; LIV maintaining strong social velocity but opportunity to amplify tech-house trending audio formats.

content_gaps.description: Chandelier/architectural visual content paired with tech-house drops (e.g., Westend, NOIZU style) gaining traction at OMNIA, Zouk; LIV posts emphasize guest reviews but lack high-production architectural showcase content
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 short-form (15-30s) reels showcasing LIV's architectural features during tech-house sets; pair with trending audio from recent Westend/NOIZU performances

content_gaps.description: @globeth0tter and similar micro-influencers creating LIV review content; Hakkasan/OMNIA running deeper creator partnerships with behind-the-scenes angle
content_gaps.suggested_action: Reach out to 2-3 Vegas creators (1M+ following) for backstage/VIP takeovers; emphasize John Summit residency momentum

content_gaps.description: TAO Group (Palm Tree, TAO Beach) running continuous dayclub content; LIV Beach posts exist but lack weekly countdown/flash-sale urgency messaging
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 2-3 weekly 'LIV Beach Thursday' countdown stories with limited-time bottle service promos; tie to upcoming DJ lineup
